items.description: Disabled vehicle on I-95 northbound between 1 miles SOUTH of Exit 22: I-676/US 30 - CENTRAL PHILA/CALLOWHILL ST and Exit 22: I-676/US 30 - CENTRAL PHILA/CALLOWHILL ST. There is a lane restriction.
